title: Adding a calculated date in a calndar view
excerpt:
Adding a date in a calendar view. 
Please, any advice?

posts.author: Abraham (Abraham Hirsch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Adding a date in a calendar view.
Please, any advice?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Abraham! Sorry for the late reply on this!

For adding an event to a date in a Calendar View, you can click into the date cell and then add it directly there, or you can add an item in your board and add a date in its date column and it should appear in the Calendar View.

If this doesn’t quite meet what you’re looking for, let us know at support@monday.com and we’ll be happy to help you there!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
